content:
First i want to say Congratulations on releasing the game in JP.

Now onto the remark/suggestion . 
We learned that the in the JP version there will be gameplay difference with GLB , honestly i don't think thats a good idea community wise , all currently available community ressource (guide,tier list and other) will be complitely worthless for the JP crowd and in the future JP made ressource will be useless to the GLB crowd , i feel like splitting the community is a really bad idea(they also have their own discord server ?!).It could just be like other gacha game , being 1/2 year(or less depending on update speed) late and just following a similar update schedule as the GLB version(or an accelerated one) that way JP and GLB players can communicate and relate.

Thanks for reading my concern about this segregation of community

Congrats on the official Japanese release.

However, from what I can gather, the JP version of the game are vastly different from the global version.
This includes different character skills and enlightenments, different covenant effects, different relics and some boss has different mechanics, etc.
The differences are so huge that it's almost like running two different games, which I'd imagine is a huge workload increase.

Thus I have concerns about the game development going forward.

Depending on how you guys allocate the work loads, I'm worried this might hugely impact the global version's development time. 

As a matter of facts, there are already a lot of players share the thoughts of slow releases on new contents, and tendencies to neglecting old systems.

So please share with us more with your future plans on the matter. How do you plan to run two vastly different game versions at the same time. 
Better yet: a road map of sorts.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Concerns about dev resources with the Japanese release.

Hello, I was wondering if I was reading it wrong, but banners say you receive gnosis fragments and even refined gnosis fragment when receiving duplicates, on top of the 50 radix sediments, but I don't ever recall seeing any gnosis fragment pop up from my pulls despite plenty of duplicates Thais and what not.
The text feels new, as I don't remember seeing it before and I tend to read everything but maybe I missed that part.

Either way I'd love to have more gnosis fragments, so how do you get these from the pulls?
